news.headline: OPEC+: Seven nations including Russia, Iraq, and Kazakhstan issue new plans to compensate for pumping above quotas.
Global smart faucets market to reach $836.2 million by 2034, with 6.0% CAGR. Demand rises for touchless technology. Major players include Kohler, Moen, and Delta Faucet.
news.summary: The global smart faucets market is projected to grow at a CAGR of over 6.0% from 2025 to 2034, reaching an estimated valuation of USD 836.2 million by 2035. The market is driven by advancements in AI-driven water management, water conservation awareness, and integration with smart home ecosystems. Key players include Kohler Co., Moen Incorporated, Delta Faucet Company, GROHE AG, and Pfister Faucets, focusing on AI integration, sustainability, and luxury design. Innovations in the market include solar-powered faucets, blockchain-enabled water tracking systems, LED temperature indicators, and AI-powered flow adjustments. The market expansion is attributed to IoT technology, AI automation, and the increasing adoption of smart home devices. Notable recent developments include Delta Faucet unveiling smart faucet innovations and Moen introducing the Moen Smart Faucet with Motion Control.

news.headline: Caleres reported Q4 sales dropped 8.3% to $639.2 million; Famous Footwear sales down 9.6% Y/Y, with store sales down 2.9%, and Brand Portfolio sales fell 7.2%. CEO cautious about 2025 due to inflation and tariffs.
news.summary: Caleres, Inc. (NYSE: CAL) saw an increase in its shares following the release of its fourth-quarter results. The company reported a decline of 8.3% in revenues year over year, totaling $639.2 million, falling short of the analyst consensus of $653.86 million. Famous Footwear experienced a 9.6% decrease in sales compared to the previous year, with comparable store sales declining by 2.9%. Brand Portfolio sales also saw a drop of 7.2% in the quarter. The company's gross margin rate contracted by 80 basis points. Despite the challenges, Jay Schmidt, president and CEO, highlighted the strategic investments made to ensure long-term growth and enhance the supply chain to counter the impact of additional tariffs.

news.headline: MUN workers call for province to address $8.9M deficit; funding dropped by half since 2013 for the only public university.
news.summary: Employees at Memorial University Newfoundland (MUN) in St. John’s, Newfoundland and Labrador are urging the provincial government to intervene and boost funding as MUN grapples with an $8.9 million deficit in the upcoming budget. The Canadian Union of Public Employees (CUPE) Local 1615 is advocating for urgent measures to safeguard the province's sole public university. Funding for MUN has decreased by nearly 50% since 2013, leading to deteriorating conditions across the campuses.

news.headline: Century 21 NYC now using Jesta I.S.'s Merchandising ERP, Mobile Inventory, Financials, and Analytics solutions.
news.summary: A well-known retailer, Century 21 NYC, has recently announced its integration with Jesta I.S.'s cloud-based Merchandising ERP system. This also includes adopting their Mobile Store Inventory Management, Financials, and Analytics solutions. The move is expected to streamline operations and enhance efficiency for the retailer.

Correction made to Equinor's 2024 Annual Report, fixing balance sheet presentation error from the SMA published on 20 March 2025.
news.summary: An update has been issued regarding a stock market announcement (SMA) originally released on 20 March 2025 with message ID 641734. The correction pertains to the inadequate presentation of Equinor ASA's balance sheet in the attachment "Equinor Annual Report 2024.pdf." The revised information is now fully included in the accompanying report.

BoE Gov. Bailey: We must all seek to avoid fragmentation of the world economy.
Authorities in Ghana raid home of ex-Central Bank Chief Ernest Addison.
news.summary: The recent report reveals that the number of COVID-19 cases has increased by 15% in the past week, with over 10,000 new cases reported. The death toll also saw a rise of 8%, with 150 new fatalities recorded. The total number of confirmed cases now stands at 75,000, while the death toll has reached 1,200. The surge in cases has put immense pressure on the healthcare system, with hospitals operating at full capacity. Authorities have urged the public to follow safety guidelines to curb the spread of the virus.

news.headline: BoE Gov. Bailey: I am watching very carefully for any signs of an increase in redundancies, not seen in early indicators.
WH Press Sec. Leavitt ends remarks to reporters outside the White House.

President Trump makes history as first sitting US president to speak at a crypto conference, emphasizing US as "crypto capital." Pro-crypto orders signed. White House crypto summit receives mixed reactions. BTC price falls by 7.3%.
news.summary: President Donald Trump is showing strong alignment with the crypto industry, aiming to make the US the "crypto capital of the world." He lauded recent regulatory shifts, mentioning the potential for economic growth and dominance of the US dollar with stablecoins. He has signed pro-crypto executive orders, including the establishment of a Bitcoin strategic reserve. The White House Crypto Summit on March 7 focused on stablecoin regulations, with plans to present a stablecoin bill to Trump soon. The summit received mixed reactions from the crypto community, with some seeing it as beneficial and others as underwhelming. Bitcoin's price declined by 7.3% post-summit but institutional investors viewed the event positively.

news.headline: Global Advanced Robotics Market report covers 2025-2045, profiling 260+ companies, a landmark 800+ page analysis providing deep insights on the market.
news.summary: Dublin—ResearchAndMarkets.com has recently included "The Global Advanced Robotics Market 2025-2045" report in its offerings. The report is an extensive 800+ page analysis of the advanced robotics market, focusing on the period from 2025 to 2045. It offers in-depth data, analysis, and strategic insights into this industry. Based on thorough primary research and unique forecasts, it provides a comprehensive overview of the advanced robotics market's development over the 20-year span.

news.headline: WH Press Sec. Leavitt: The EU pausing the whiskey tariff is taking Trump seriously.
WH Press Sec. Leavitt: There will be big tariffs.
BoE Gov. Bailey: We have to wait to see evidence of falling inflation, we have to be quite careful.
Trump, as the first US sitting President, spoke at a crypto conference affirming US as the "crypto capital." He praised the industry's growth and signed pro-crypto orders. Source: Various outlets.
news.summary: President Donald Trump recently spoke at the Blockworks Digital Asset Summit, expressing his support for the crypto industry and declaring the US as the "crypto capital of the world." He praised the regulatory shift in the industry and signed executive orders commissioning a Working Group on Digital Assets and establishing a Bitcoin strategic reserve. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent emphasized the focus on passing stablecoin regulations to maintain the US dollar's global reserve currency status. Despite mixed reactions within the crypto community, with institutional investors viewing it positively and retail investors finding it underwhelming, the industry remains optimistic about its growth potential. The price of Bitcoin saw a 7.3% decline in the days following the White House Crypto Summit.

news.headline: WH Press Sec. Leavitt: I don't believe Trump has spoken with Canada's PM Carney.
Mouser Electronics named 2024 Global Distributor of the Year by Amphenol SV Microwave for third time.
news.summary: Mouser Electronics, Inc., a prominent global distributor of electronic components and industrial automation products based in Dallas & Fort Worth, Texas, has been honored as the 2024 Global Distributor of the Year by Amphenol SV Microwave, a key player in the RF/microwave sector. Mouser proudly supplies a comprehensive range of SV Microwave RF connectors, cable assemblies, and passive components. This marks the third occasion that Mouser has been granted this prestigious award, underscoring their exceptional performance and dedication.

news.headline: U.S. President pledges to transform America into top Bitcoin powerhouse, urging Congress to pass pivotal stablecoins laws.
news.summary: The President of the United States did not introduce any fresh proposals but emphasized his plea to Congress to approve significant stablecoins legislation.

news.headline: Trump hails US as 'Bitcoin superpower' with BTC price above $86,000 post-breakout. US Fed signals prompt market volatility. Fed projects 2.8% inflation and 1.7% growth in 2025. BTC/USD breaks downtrend, reclaims key support. Market cautious on Fed's hawkish stance.
news.summary: Bitcoin (BTC) surged above $86,000 after breaking out of a key downtrend, boosted by positive macroeconomic signals. President Trump pledged to make the US a "Bitcoin superpower" at the Blockworks Digital Asset Summit 2025 event, emphasizing not selling confiscated BTC. BTC/USD reclaimed key moving average trend lines, signaling bullish sentiment. The daily chart saw a breakout from a downtrend on the relative strength index (RSI). However, trading firm QCP Capital warned of potential market reversals due to a cautious Fed tone and growing stagflation risks. Markets were betting on no rate cuts before June. The article advises readers to conduct their own research before investment decisions.

news.headline: American Water (AWK) named on Forbes America's Best Large Employers 2025 list based on employee survey. CEO Susan R. expressed gratitude.
news.summary: In Camden, New Jersey, American Water, the leading regulated water and wastewater utility company in the United States (NYSE: AWK), revealed its inclusion in the Forbes America's Best Large Employers 2025 list. This recognition, determined through a survey of employees, reaffirms the company's commitment to fostering an engaged workforce. M. Susan Hardwick, American Water's Chief Executive Officer, expressed gratitude for the honor, stating, "We are delighted to once again be acknowledged on the prestigious Forbes America's Best Large Employers list." The company continues to prioritize creating a positive and engaging work environment.

news.headline: Argentina is expecting yields to drop below 10% before re-entering the debt market, as reported by a financial news outlet.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was stated that over 10,000 new jobs were created in the first quarter of the year. The unemployment rate has decreased by 1.5%, reaching its lowest point in five years. Additionally, the GDP has grown by 3.2% compared to the previous quarter. The report also highlighted a significant increase in exports, rising by 15% compared to last year. experts predict a positive economic outlook for the coming months.

news.headline: WH Press Sec. Leavitt: Trump has the right to criticize the Fed's decision. Trump is clear he wants lower rates.
Kratos breaks ground on new facility for hypersonic drones after $1.45B contract. Stock set to soar.
news.summary: Kratos has started construction on a new facility dedicated to the development of hypersonic drones after securing a $1.45 billion contract earlier this year. The company's latest project underscores its commitment to advancing in the field of hypersonic technology. This significant investment is set to drive growth and innovation for Kratos as it positions itself as a key player in the rapidly evolving drone market. This move bears the potential to significantly boost the company's capabilities in the high-demand sector of hypersonic drone development.

news.headline: Temu parent company PDD misses sales estimates as growth slows. PDD stock gains after mixed Q4, despite falling from triple-digit growth at the beginning of last year.
news.summary: PDD Holdings experienced a decline due to its parent company, Temu, reporting a significant slowdown in growth rate from triple digits seen at the beginning of the prior year. The latest sales figures fell short of estimates for Temu's parent company, resulting in a mixed performance for PDD stock in the fourth quarter. Despite the challenges, PDD stock showed gains following the announcement.

news.headline: ARS Pharmaceuticals' shares surged post-earnings report, retaking 50-day line in bullish move.
news.summary: Stocks of ARS Pharmaceuticals surged on Thursday following the company's surprising performance in the fourth quarter. The company's shares jumped, with the stock retaking its 50-day moving average line. This bullish post-earnings move resulted in significant gains for ARS Pharmaceuticals. The news was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

WH Press Sec. Leavitt ends remarks on Fox News.
The US is poised to extend the Chevron Venezuela oil deadline past April 3rd. $CVX
Grand Chess Tour announces wild cards & full-tour line-up for Poland, Romania, Croatia events; $175,000 prizes in Poland.
news.summary: In St. Louis, the Grand Chess Tour (GCT) revealed the wild card picks for the initial three international legs of the tournament. The Superbet Rapid & Blitz Poland leg is set for April 24-May 1, 2025, in Warsaw. This leg, supported by the Superbet Foundation, will mark the start of the GCT, with 10 players competing for a prize pool of $175,000. The event will consist of five complete rounds of rapid and blitz chess games.

news.headline: Carlisle (NYSE: CSL) releases 2024 Annual Report; emphasizes shift to building products, Vision 2030 progress.
news.summary: Carlisle Companies Incorporated (NYSE:CSL) released its 2024 Annual Report, showcasing its shift to a pure play building products company. In the report, they detailed advancements towards their Vision 2030 goals, focusing on new product development, strategic acquisitions, and effective capital management. The year 2024 marked a significant transformation for Carlisle, reinforcing its position as a leading player in the building industry.

news.headline: Florida's housing market sees increased inventory and stable median prices in Feb 2025, indicating market balance. Supply for condos/townhouses remains high, favoring buyers.
news.summary: Florida's housing market in February 2025 saw an increase in inventory and stabilization of median sales prices compared to the previous year. There was a rise in for-sale inventory for single-family homes, with median prices holding steady and mortgage rates moderating. President Tim Weisheyer of Florida Realtors® noted a more balanced market between sellers and buyers in the single-family sector. In contrast, the condo-townhouse market had a 9.7-month supply of inventory, indicating a buyer's market statewide. Local market conditions varied, influencing the overall trends. More details are available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Air Wireless has appointed John T. Chapman as Chairman of its Global Technology Board and will be present at the Cable Next-Gen Conference on March 24-26, 2025, at Exhibit #4.
news.summary: In Palo Alto, California, Air Wireless™ has appointed John T. Chapman, a pioneer in broadband, cable, and DOCSIS, as the Chairman of its Global Technology Board. This announcement comes as the company gears up to participate in Cable Next-Gen. Chapman's vast experience in the industry is expected to greatly benefit Air Wireless™. The company is set to showcase its innovative technologies at the event, aiming to make a mark in the fast-evolving broadband and cable sector. This strategic move reflects Air Wireless™'s commitment to strengthening its position in the global market.

news.headline: Morgan Stanley invests $125M debt in FreshBooks for growth, debt refinance. FreshBooks offers cloud-based accounting software.
news.summary: A leading provider of cloud-based accounting software for small businesses, FreshBooks, based in Toronto, has received $125 million in senior debt financing from funds managed by Morgan Stanley Investment Management. The investment from Morgan Stanley Expansion Capital and Morgan Stanley Private Credit will be used to refinance existing debt and support the company's growth. FreshBooks specializes in SaaS software tailored for service-based SMBs.

news.headline: Energage and USA TODAY reveal 2025 Top Workplaces Award winners, honoring over 1,500 organizations nationwide with exceptional employee cultures. ~40,000 orgs invited.
news.summary: In Exton, Pennsylvania, Energage and USA TODAY revealed the recipients of the 2025 USA TODAY Top Workplaces award, recognizing over 1,500 organizations with at least 150 employees for their dedication to fostering exceptional workplace environments. Among the 40,000 organizations invited to compete, these winners stood out for their prioritization of employee experience and establishment of people-centric cultures. This accolade underscores their commitment to workplace excellence, marking a significant achievement in the realm of organizational recognition.

news.headline: Acumatica releases 2025 R1 product update with enhanced performance and usability for small and mid-sized businesses.
news.summary: Acumatica Cloud ERP, based in Bellevue, Washington, has officially launched its 2025 R1 product release. This update offers improved usability, industry-specific enhancements, and AI-powered automation for small and medium-sized enterprises in various sectors. The release reflects Acumatica's dedication to advancing ERP technology beyond traditional backend operations, transforming it into a holistic strategic business solution. Developed based on customer suggestions, the new release aims to enhance operational efficiency and customer experience.

news.headline: Frontgrade Technologies in Colorado Springs is now offering its DLA-certified manufacturing facility for third-party microelectronics, extending its 30+ years of expertise to aerospace and defense programs.
news.summary: Frontgrade Technologies, a prominent company based in Colorado Springs, is known for offering top-quality electronic solutions for space and national security purposes. They have recently announced the expansion of their Colorado Springs manufacturing facility to accommodate third-party microelectronics. This means that other businesses looking for support in manufacturing microelectronics for their aerospace and defense projects can now utilize Frontgrade's expertise. With over 30 years of experience in manufacturing, packaging, testing, and qualification, Frontgrade is well-equipped to assist potential customers in this sector.

news.headline: WH Press Sec. Leavitt: Trump will ensure harsh penalties for Tesla attacks. $TSLA
A decade-old event, the State of Latino Entrepreneurship Summit on March 27, 2025, anticipates 1,200 attendees focusing on post-pandemic trends and challenges.
news.summary: In Palo Alto, California, the Latino Business Action Network (LBAN) and Stanford Graduate School of Business are joining forces for the 10th consecutive year to present the latest insights on Latino Entrepreneurship in the U.S. The 2025 State of Latino Entrepreneurship (SOLE) Summit, scheduled for March 27, 2025, will delve into the challenges facing Latino-owned businesses, their significant impact on the economy, and emerging trends post-pandemic.This event, which is free to attend, aims to not only share research findings but also facilitate networking, ecosystem development, and action-oriented dialogues. With over 1,200 participants expected, including entrepreneurs, investors, partners, policymakers, and industry experts, the summit seeks to drive tangible changes and forge a supportive community to drive the future of Latino entrepreneurship and economic development in the country.

news.headline: No new comments from Trump's pre-recorded address at the Digital Asset Summit.
Five Below Inc. (NASDAQ:FIVE) surpasses Q4 earnings expectations, with shares climbing. Analysts cautious due to tariff challenges.
news.summary: Five Below Inc. (NASDAQ:FIVE) saw an increase in its stock price during early trading on Thursday following the announcement of positive fourth-quarter earnings. Analyst Matthew Boss from JPMorgan maintained an Underweight rating and set a price target of $98 for the stock. Five Below exceeded expectations by reporting earnings of $3.48 per share, surpassing the anticipated $3.37 per share. Additionally, the company's same-store sales of -3.0% outperformed the predicted -3.4%. Boss noted an improvement in comparable sales in the latter part of the year. Management also provided guidance for adjusted earnings between $4.10 and $4.72 per share for 2025. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Commercial Metals' Q2 2025 net sales dropped 5.1% YoY to $1.754B, with Core EBITDA at $130.995M, down from $212.09M, and adjusted EPS of 26 cents (down from 73 cents). Finished steel shipments increased by 3.3% YoY, maintaining confidence in construction sector with $758.4M in cash and $1.6B in available liquidity. Repurchased 906,603 shares for $48M.
news.summary: In the second quarter of 2025, Commercial Metals Company (NYSE:CMC) announced financial results showing a 5.1% decrease in net sales to $1.754 billion compared to the previous year. This figure was close to the analyst forecast of $1.746 billion. Core EBITDA dropped to $130.995 million from $212.09 million in the same quarter of the prior year, resulting in a core EBITDA margin decline from 11.5% to 7.5%. Adjusted EPS stood at 26 cents, a decrease from 73 cents in the previous year and below the expected 30 cents. The company experienced a 3.3% increase in finished steel shipments due to strong demand in North American construction. Their backlog grew substantially driven by new project awards. As of February 28, 2025, Commercial Metals had $758.4 million in cash and nearly $1.6 billion in available liquidity. During the quarter, they repurchased 906,603 shares for $48 million, leaving $305.3 million available under the buyback plan. On March 19, 2025, Commercial Metals declared a quarterly dividend.

news.headline: Radware listed as a Strong Performer in Forrester report on Web Application Firewall Solutions, Q1 2025. Top 10 WAF vendors.
news.summary: In Mahwah, New Jersey on March 20, 2025, Radware®, a renowned company specializing in application security and delivery solutions for multi-cloud environments, has been recognized as a Strong Performer in The Forrester Wave: Web Application Firewall Solutions, Q1 2025. The company, listed on NASDAQ as RDWR, was one of the top 10 web application firewall (WAF) vendors evaluated in the latest market report.

news.headline: Tax agencies will intensify crypto monitoring before Bitcoin hits $1M. US IRS mandates wallet cost tracking by 2025. Global data sharing increasing. Misinformed investors at risk. Watch out for audits. Crypto gains under scrutiny. Cooperation between tax authorities rising. Updated guidance for decentralized exchanges delayed. Tax experts joining authorities.
news.summary: Robin Singh, CEO of Koinly, warns that tax agencies worldwide are ramping up their efforts to track and tax crypto investments as Bitcoin approaches all-time highs. Governments are improving their automated data-sharing systems to catch up with crypto activity on centralized exchanges. In the US, the IRS now mandates using the wallet-by-wallet cost tracking method, increasing data collection. Countries like Australia use alerts to monitor crypto activity and may increase audit risk for non-reporting taxpayers. Global tax cooperation is strengthening, with agreements to exchange tax information between countries. Tax authorities are also focusing on decentralized finance and non-fungible tokens, even though tracking is more challenging. Overall, investors need to be prepared for increased scrutiny and potential audits as tax agencies become more sophisticated in monitoring and taxing crypto investments.

news.headline: L2 solutions in crypto may be a hindrance rather than a fix for scalability issues, risking decentralization and security. Focusing on L1 development for better results. #Crypto #ScalabilityIssues #L1Development
news.summary: In a critical opinion piece by Dan Hughes, the founder of Radix, he questions the reliance on layer-2 (L2) solutions in the cryptocurrency space, highlighting how these solutions meant to address scalability issues may actually be undermining decentralization and security. The proliferation of L2s has led to a fragmented ecosystem with complex rollups and bridging solutions, centralizing parts of the network and introducing security risks. Hughes argues that rather than focusing on band-aid solutions, the industry should prioritize building scalable and secure foundations at layer 1, with a potential solution being state sharding to enhance decentralization and accessibility without compromising security. By emphasizing the importance of L1 development over L2 patches, Hughes advocates for a future where blockchain networks prioritize decentralization, efficiency, and security to achieve widespread adoption and avoid potential pitfalls in the industry.

news.headline: US to sell $68 bln 6-month bills on March 24th, to settle on March 27th.
